mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to register a place.
successMessage: The recycling point was registered successfully.
title: How to recycle properly?
intro: Select the type of material you want to recycle to learn best practices.
explanation: It is important to follow the guidelines to ensure that materials can be recycled without contaminating other resources. Always keep waste clean and dry before delivering it.

papel.title: Paper and Cardboard
papel.description: You can recycle used white sheets, notebook pages, photocopies, letters, newspapers, magazines, brochures, corrugated cardboard, cards, packaging boxes, and paper cylinders.
papel.rememberText: They must be clean and dry to facilitate proper recycling.
papel.noRecycleText: Toilet paper, paper towels, napkins, thermal paper.

pet.title: PET Plastic
pet.description: You can recycle disposable bottles of drinks, water, juices, yogurts, personal hygiene and cleaning products (clear and colored), fruit trays, and cake domes.
pet.rememberText: They must be clean, dry, and compacted for recycling.
pet.noRecycleText: Oil containers must be clean, dry, and residue-free.

duro.title: Hard Plastic
duro.description: You can recycle bottle caps, drums, shampoo bottles, creams and cosmetics, as well as detergent containers, dairy products, butter and margarine tubs.
duro.rememberText: They must be clean, dry, and compacted for recycling.
duro.noRecycleText: Polystyrene containers, plastic bags or food wrappers.

tetra.title: Tetra Pak
tetra.description: You can recycle carton containers like those for milk, juices, wine, known as Tetra Pak. It is important to rinse them and take them to appropriate collection points for recycling.
tetra.rememberText: They must be rinsed, dry, dismantled, and flattened.
tetra.noRecycleText: Laminated cartons or paper cups for hot drinks.

vidrio.title: Glass
vidrio.description: You can recycle beer, juice, wine and milk, as well as glass jars for preserves. It is key to rinse them and place them in specific glass containers.
vidrio.rememberText: They must be clean, dry, and residue-free for recycling.
vidrio.noRecycleText: Mirrors, crystals, bulbs, or car windows.

latas.title: Cans
latas.description: You can recycle aluminum cans of beer, soda, energy drinks, milk, preserves, juices, and aerosols. Also, Tin cans of milk and soft drinks can also be recycled.
latas.rememberText: They must be clean, dry, and label-free.
latas.noRecycleText: Paint and chemical cans must be empty and clean.

main.title: Welcome to the Main Page
main.description: Step inside Lonyo and start managing finances like never before
